query:
SELECT ownerName, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CAST(premium AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as totalPremium 
FROM inforcePolicies 
GROUP BY ownerName 
ORDER BY count DESC 
LIMIT 20;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4XhD5JGzFycvBf8.root --database iwEifGeLgtJbCVjTZgrjir --execute SELECT ownerName, COUNT(*) as count, SUM(CAST(premium AS DECIMAL(10,2))) as totalPremium 
FROM inforcePolicies 
GROUP BY ownerName 
ORDER BY count DESC 
LIMIT 20;
